/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/aarch64-poky-linux/aarch64-poky-linux-g++ --sysroot=/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux -fPIC -std=c++14 -O3 -Wall  -shared -Wl,-soname,libpoly_traj.so -o /home/wave/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libpoly_traj.so CMakeFiles/poly_traj.dir/src/polynomial_traj.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/noetic/lib /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroscpp.so /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/librostime.so /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/libcpp_common.so
